response: Which of these wall outlets—small round-pin, large round-pin, or large flat-pin—is compatible with a small yellow Euro plug?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a small yellow Euro plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the small round-pin socket, the large round-pin socket, or the large flat-pin socket. Which one?
